Issue date of the CRL.

包含在 CRL 中的、描述已吊销证书的零个或多个参数的列表。

从公钥生成密钥标识符的方法
Defaults to a truncated SHA-256 digest. See KeyIdMethod for more information.

该证书的主体签名密钥。

One or more URI distribution point names, indicating a place the current CRL can
be retrieved. When present, SHOULD include at least one LDAP or HTTP URI.
一个或多个 URI 分发点名称，指示可以获取当前 CRL 的位置。若存在，应至少包含一个 LDAP 或 HTTP URI。
The CRL’s distribution point, containing a sequence of URIs the CRL can be retrieved from.
该 CRL 的分发点，包含可从中获取该 CRL 的 URI 序列。

An optional description of the CRL’s scope. If omitted, the CRL may contain
both user certs and CA certs.
对 CRL 范围的可选描述。若省略，则该 CRL 可同时包含用户证书与 CA 证书。
A list of subtrees that the domain has to match.
该域名必须匹配的子树列表。
A list of subtrees that the domain must not match.
该域名不得匹配的子树列表。
Any name matching an excluded subtree is invalid even if it also matches a permitted subtree.
任何匹配被排除子树的名字都无效，即使它也匹配允许的子树。
Serial number identifying the revoked certificate.
标识已吊销证书的序列号。
The date at which the CA processed the revocation.
CA 处理该吊销的日期。
An optional reason code identifying why the certificate was revoked.
标识证书为何被吊销的可选原因代码。

An optional field describing the date on which it was known or suspected that the
private key was compromised or the certificate otherwise became invalid.
可选字段，描述已知或怀疑私钥泄露、或证书以其他方式失效的日期。

Sets an optional upper limit on the length of the intermediate certificate chain

为该 CA 证书所允许的中间证书链长度（不含最终实体证书）设置可选的上限。

You might know CIDR subnets better by their textual representation
where they consist of an ip address followed by a slash and a prefix
number, for example 192.168.99.0/24.
你可能更熟悉 CIDR 子网的文本表示形式——它由一个 IP 地址后跟斜杠和前缀长度组成，例如 192.168.99.0/24。

The first field in the enum is the address, the second is the mask.
Both are specified in network byte order.
枚举中第一个字段是地址，第二个是掩码。两者均按网络字节序指定。

Obtains the CidrSubnet from an ip address
as well as the specified prefix number.
从 IP 地址以及指定的前缀长度获取 CidrSubnet。

Obtains the CidrSubnet from an IPv4 address in network byte order
as well as the specified prefix.
从网络字节序的 IPv4 地址以及指定的前缀获取 CidrSubnet。

Obtains the CidrSubnet from an IPv6 address in network byte order
as well as the specified prefix.
从网络字节序的 IPv6 地址以及指定的前缀获取 CidrSubnet。

Obtains the CidrSubnet from the well-known
addr/prefix notation.
从众所周知的 addr/前缀记法获取 CidrSubnet。
One of the purposes contained in the extended key usage extension
扩展密钥用途扩展中包含的用途之一

This type has similarities to the SanType enum but is not equal.
For example, GeneralSubtree has CIDR subnets for ip addresses
while SanType has IP addresses.
此类型与 SanType 枚举类似但并不相同。例如，GeneralSubtree 对 IP 地址使用 CIDR 子网，而 SanType 使用 IP 地址。

Key identifiers should be derived from the public key data. RFC 7093 defines
three methods to do so using a choice of SHA256 (method 1), SHA384 (method 2), or SHA512
(method 3). In each case the first
密钥标识符应从公钥数据派生。RFC 7093 定义了三种派生方法：SHA256（方法 1）、SHA384（方法 2）或 SHA512（方法 3）。在每种情况下，前

In addition to the RFC 7093 mechanisms, rcgen supports using a pre-specified key identifier.
This can be helpful when working with an existing Certificate.
除 RFC 7093 机制外，rcgen 还支持使用预指定的密钥标识符。这在与现有证书协作时很有用。
One of the purposes contained in the key usage extension
密钥用途扩展中包含的用途之一
An OtherName value, defined in RFC 5280§4.1.2.4.
RFC 5280 §4.1.2.4 中定义的 OtherName 值。

While the standard specifies this could be any ASN.1 type rcgen limits
the value to a UTF-8 encoded string as this will cover the most common
use cases, for instance smart card user principal names (U
虽然标准规定它可以是任意 ASN.1 类型，但 rcgen 将值限定为 UTF-8 编码字符串，因为这能覆盖最常见的用例，例如智能卡的用户主体名（U

Identifies the reason a certificate was revoked.
See RFC 5280 §5.3.1
标识证书被吊销的原因。参见 RFC 5280 §5.3.1
Helper to obtain an OffsetDateTime from year, month, day values
从年、月、日取值获取 OffsetDateTime 的辅助函数
The year, month, day values are assumed to be in UTC.
年、月、日取值假定为 UTC。

This helper function serves two purposes: first, so that you don’t
have to import the time crate yourself in order to specify date
information, second so that users don’t have to type unproportionatel
该辅助函数有两个用途：第一，无需自己导入 time crate 即可指定日期信息；第二，避免用户手动输入不成比例的
KISS function to generate a self signed certificate
用于生成自签名证书的 KISS 函数

Given a set of domain names you want your certificate to be valid for,
this function fills in the other generation parameters with
reasonable defaults and generates a self signed certificate
and key p
给定你的证书应生效的一组域名，此函数会使用合理的默认设置填充其他生成参数，并生成自签名证书及密钥对

The most simple way of using this crate is by calling the
generate_simple_self_signed function.
For more customization abilities, construct a CertificateParams and
a key pair to call CertificateParams
使用本 crate 最简单的方式是调用 generate_simple_self_signed 函数。若需要更灵活的定制，可构造 CertificateParams 和一个密钥对来调用 CertificateParams
ECDSA signing using the P-256 curves and SHA-256 hashing as per RFC 5758
按 RFC 5758 使用 P-256 曲线与 SHA-256 哈希的 ECDSA 签名

按 RFC 5758 使用 P-384 曲线与 SHA-384 哈希的 ECDSA 签名

按 RFC 8410 进行的 ED25519 曲线签名

按 RFC 4055 使用 PKCS#1 1.5 填充与 SHA-384 哈希的 RSA 签名

按 RFC 4055 使用 PKCS#1 1.5 填充与 SHA-512 哈希的 RSA 签名
ASN.1 BMPString type.
ASN.1 BMPString 类型。
You can create a BmpString from a literal string with BmpString::try_from:
你可以使用 BmpString::try_from 通过字面量字符串创建 BmpString：

Encodes Basic Multilingual Plane (BMP) subset of Unicode (ISO 10646),
a.k.a. UCS-2.
对 Unicode 基本多文种平面（BMP）子集（ISO 10646），即 UCS-2 进行编码。
Bytes are encoded as UTF-16 big-endian.
字节以 UTF-16 大端序编码。

BMPString is included for backward compatibility, RFC 5280 say it
SHOULD NOT be used for certificates for new subjects.
包含 BMPString 是为了向后兼容；RFC 5280 规定它不应被用于新证书的主体。
Returns a byte slice of this BmpString’s contents.
返回此 BmpString 内容的字节切片。
The inverse of this method is from_utf16be.
该方法的逆操作是 from_utf16be。
Decode a UTF-16BE–encoded vector vec into a BmpString, returning Err if vec contains any invalid data.
将 UTF-16BE 编码的向量 vec 解码为 BmpString；若 vec 含任何无效数据则返回 Err。
Converts a &str to a BmpString.
将 &str 转换为 BmpString。

Any character not in the BmpString charset will be rejected.
See BmpString documentation for more information.
任何不属于 BmpString 字符集的字符都将被拒绝。更多信息请参见 BmpString 文档。
Parsing a BmpString allocates memory since the UTF-8 to UTF-16 conversion requires a memory allocation.
解析 BmpString 会分配内存，因为 UTF-8 到 UTF-16 的转换需要一次内存分配。
You can create a Ia5String from a literal string with Ia5String::try_from:
你可以使用 Ia5String::try_from 通过字面量字符串创建 Ia5String：

the 128 characters of the ASCII alphabet. (Note: IA5 is now
technically known as the International Reference Alphabet or IRA as
支持国际字母表第 5 号（IA5）字符编码，即 ASCII 字母表的 128 个字符。（注：IA5 在技术上现在称为国际参考字母表或 IRA，如
Extracts a string slice containing the entire Ia5String.
提取包含整个 Ia5String 的字符串切片。
Converts a &str to a Ia5String.
将 &str 转换为 Ia5String。

Any character not in the Ia5String charset will be rejected.
See Ia5String documentation for more information.
任何不属于 Ia5String 字符集的字符都将被拒绝。更多信息请参见 Ia5String 文档。
The result is allocated on the heap.
结果分配在堆上。

ASN.1 PrintableString 类型。
Supports a subset of the ASCII printable characters (described below).
支持 ASCII 可打印字符的子集（见下文）。

For the full ASCII character set, use
Ia5String.

你可以使用 PrintableString::try_from 通过字面量字符串创建 PrintableString：

PrintableString is a subset of the ASCII printable characters.
For instance, '@' is a printable character as per ASCII but can’t be part of ASN.1’s PrintableString.
PrintableString 是 ASCII 可打印字符的子集。例如，'@' 按 ASCII 是可打印字符，但不能作为 ASN.1 PrintableString 的一部分。
The following ASCII characters/ranges are supported:
支持以下 ASCII 字符/范围：
Extracts a string slice containing the entire PrintableString.
提取包含整个 PrintableString 的字符串切片。

将 &str 转换为 PrintableString。

Any character not in the PrintableString charset will be rejected.
See PrintableString documentation for more information.
任何不属于 PrintableString 字符集的字符都将被拒绝。更多信息请参见 PrintableString 文档。

ASN.1 TeletexString 类型。
You can create a TeletexString from a literal string with TeletexString::try_from:
你可以使用 TeletexString::try_from 通过字面量字符串创建 TeletexString：

The standard defines a complex character set allowed in this type. However, quoting the ASN.1
mailing list, “a sizable volume of software in the world treats TeletexString (T61String) as a
simple 8-bi
标准为该类型定义了复杂的字符集。然而，引用 ASN.1 邮件列表的说法：“世界上有相当数量的软件将 TeletexString（T61String）视为简单的 8 位

TeletexString is included for backward compatibility, RFC 5280 say it
SHOULD NOT be used for certificates for new subjects.
包含 TeletexString 是为了向后兼容；RFC 5280 规定它不应被用于新证书的主体。
Extracts a string slice containing the entire TeletexString.
提取包含整个 TeletexString 的字符串切片。
Returns a byte slice of this TeletexString’s contents.
返回此 TeletexString 内容的字节切片。
Converts a &str to a TeletexString.
将 &str 转换为 TeletexString。

Any character not in the TeletexString charset will be rejected.
See TeletexString documentation for more information.
任何不属于 TeletexString 字符集的字符都将被拒绝。更多信息请参见 TeletexString 文档。
This conversion does not allocate or copy memory.
此转换不分配也不复制内存。
ASN.1 UniversalString type.
ASN.1 UniversalString 类型。
You can create a UniversalString from a literal string with UniversalString::try_from:
你可以使用 UniversalString::try_from 通过字面量字符串创建 UniversalString：

The characters which can appear in the UniversalString type are any of the characters allowed by
ISO/IEC 10646 (Unicode).
UniversalString 类型可出现的字符是 ISO/IEC 10646（Unicode）所允许的任何字符。
Bytes are encoded like UTF-32 big-endian.
字节以 UTF-32 大端序编码。

UniversalString is included for backward compatibility, RFC 5280 say it
SHOULD NOT be used for certificates for new subjects.
包含 UniversalString 是为了向后兼容；RFC 5280 规定它不应被用于新证书的主体。
Returns a byte slice of this UniversalString’s contents.
返回此 UniversalString 内容的字节切片。
The inverse of this method is from_utf32be.
该方法的逆操作是 from_utf32be。
Decode a UTF-32BE–encoded vector vec into a UniversalString, returning Err if vec contains any invalid data.
将 UTF-32BE 编码的向量 vec 解码为 UniversalString；若 vec 含任何无效数据则返回 Err。
Converts a &str to a UniversalString.
将 &str 转换为 UniversalString。

Any character not in the UniversalString charset will be rejected.
See UniversalString documentation for more information.
任何不属于 UniversalString 字符集的字符都将被拒绝。更多信息请参见 UniversalString 文档。
Parsing a UniversalString allocates memory since the UTF-8 to UTF-32 conversion requires a memory allocation.
解析 UniversalString 会分配内存，因为 UTF-8 到 UTF-32 的转换需要一次内存分配。

A PKCS #10 CSR attribute, as defined in RFC 5280 and constrained
by RFC 2986.
由 RFC 5280 定义、并受 RFC 2986 约束的 PKCS #10 CSR 属性。

CertificateDer implements Deref<Target = [u8]> and AsRef<[u8]>, so you can easily
extract the DER bytes from the return value.
CertificateDer 实现了 Deref<Target = [u8]> 与 AsRef<[u8]>，因此你可以轻松地从返回值中提取 DER 字节。

CertificateRevocationListDer implements Deref<Target = [u8]> and AsRef<[u8]>,
so you can easily extract the DER bytes from the return value.
CertificateRevocationListDer 实现了 Deref<Target = [u8]> 与 AsRef<[u8]>，因此你可以轻松地从返回值中提取 DER 字节。

CertificateSigningRequestDer implements Deref<Target = [u8]> and AsRef<[u8]>,
so you can easily extract the DER bytes from the return value.
CertificateSigningRequestDer 实现了 Deref<Target = [u8]> 与 AsRef<[u8]>，因此你可以轻松地从返回值中提取 DER 字节。
An optional CRL extension identifying the CRL distribution point and scope for a particular CRL as described in RFC 5280 Section 5.2.51.
标识特定 CRL 分发点与范围的可选 CRL 扩展，如 RFC 5280 第 5.2.5 节1 所述。

Generate a new certificate based on the requested parameters, signed by the provided
issuer.
基于所请求的参数生成新证书，并由所提供的签发者签名。

The returned certificate will have its issuer field set to the subject of the provided
issuer, and the authority key identifier extension will be populated using the subject
public key of issuer. It w
返回的证书将其 issuer 字段设置为所提供的签发者的 subject，并使用该签发者的主体公钥填充 authority key identifier 扩展。它会

Note that no validation of the issuer certificate is performed. Rcgen will not require
the certificate to be a CA certificate, or have key usage extensions that allow signing.
注意，不会对签发者证书进行任何验证。Rcgen 不要求该证书是 CA 证书，也不要求其具有允许签名的密钥用途扩展。
The returned Certificate may be serialized using Certificate::der and Certificate::pem.
返回的 Certificate 可通过 Certificate::der 与 Certificate::pem 序列化。
Create a new issuer from the given parameters and key, signed by the given issuer.
从给定参数和密钥创建新签发者，并由给定签发者签名。

A certificate revocation list (CRL) distribution point, to be included in a certificate’s
distribution points extension or
a CRL’s issuing distribution point extension
证书吊销列表（CRL）分发点，应包含在证书的分发点扩展中或 CRL 的 issuing distribution point 扩展中

A certificate revocation list (CRL) issuing distribution point, to be included in a CRL’s
issuing distribution point extension.
证书吊销列表（CRL）issuing distribution point，应包含在 CRL 的 issuing distribution point 扩展中。

A custom extension of a certificate, as specified in
RFC 5280
如 RFC 5280 所述的证书自定义扩展

Creates a new acmeIdentifier extension for ACME TLS-ALPN-01
as specified in RFC 8737
按 RFC 8737 创建用于 ACME TLS-ALPN-01 的 acmeIdentifier 扩展
Panics if the passed sha_digest parameter doesn’t hold 32 bytes (256 bits).
若传入的 sha_digest 参数不包含 32 字节（256 位），则会发生 panic。
A distinguished name is a set of (attribute type, attribute value) tuples.
可分辨名称是一组 (属性类型, 属性值) 元组。
This datastructure keeps them ordered by insertion order.
该数据结构按插入顺序保存它们。

See also the RFC 5280 sections on the issuer
and subject fields.
另请参见 RFC 5280 中关于 issuer 与 subject 字段的章节。

Returns true when an actual removal happened, false
when no attribute with the specified DnType was
found.
当实际发生了删除时返回 true；当未找到具有指定 DnType 的属性时返回 false。
An issuer that can sign certificates.
能够签署证书的签发者。

Encapsulates the distinguished name, key identifier method, key usages and signing key
of the issuing certificate.
封装了签发证书的可分辨名称、密钥标识符方法、密钥用途以及签名密钥。

Use Issuer::new instead if you want to obtain an Issuer that owns
its parameters.
若你希望获得一个拥有其参数的 Issuer，请改用 Issuer::new。
Generate a new random PKCS_ECDSA_P256_SHA256 key pair
生成新的随机 PKCS_ECDSA_P256_SHA256 密钥对

If you’re not sure which algorithm to use, PKCS_ECDSA_P256_SHA256 is a good choice.
If passed an RSA signature algorithm, it depends on the backend whether we return
a generated key or an error for ke
如果你不确定使用哪种算法，PKCS_ECDSA_P256_SHA256 是一个不错的选择。若传入 RSA 签名算法，则根据后端的不同，可能会返回生成的密钥或返回错误（针对密钥

If aws_lc_rs feature is used, then the key must be a DER-encoded plaintext private key; as specified in PKCS #8/RFC 5958, SEC1/RFC 5915, or PKCS#1/RFC 3447;
Appears as “PRIVATE KEY”, “RSA PRIVATE KEY”
若使用 aws_lc_rs feature，则密钥必须是按 PKCS #8/RFC 5958、SEC1/RFC 5915 或 PKCS#1/RFC 3447 规定的 DER 编码明文私钥；在 PEM 文件中显示为“PRIVATE KEY”、“RSA PRIVATE KEY”

Otherwise if the ring feature is used, then the key must be a DER-encoded plaintext private key; as specified in PKCS #8/RFC 5958;
Appears as “PRIVATE KEY” in PEM files.
否则，若使用 ring feature，则密钥必须是按 PKCS #8/RFC 5958 规定的 DER 编码明文私钥；在 PEM 文件中显示为“PRIVATE KEY”。

Obtains the key pair from a DER formatted key
using the specified SignatureAlgorithm
使用指定的 SignatureAlgorithm 从 DER 格式的密钥获取密钥对
密钥必须是按 PKCS #8/RFC 5958 规定的 DER 编码明文私钥；在 PEM 文件中显示为“PRIVATE KEY”。与 from_pkcs8_pem_and_sign_algo 相同。

If you have a PrivatePkcs8KeyDer, you can usually rely on the TryFrom implementation
to obtain a KeyPair – it will determine the correct SignatureAlgorithm for you.
However, sometimes multiple signatu
如果你有 PrivatePkcs8KeyDer，通常可依赖 TryFrom 实现来获取 KeyPair —— 它会为你确定正确的 SignatureAlgorithm。但有时可能存在多个签名算法

rustls_pemfile::private_key() is often used to obtain a PrivateKeyDer from PEM
input. If the obtained PrivateKeyDer is a Pkcs8 variant, you can use its contents
as input for this function. Alternative
rustls_pemfile::private_key() 常用于从 PEM 输入获取 PrivateKeyDer。若获得的 PrivateKeyDer 是 Pkcs8 变体，你可以将其内容用作此函数的输入。另一种方式是

Obtains the key pair from a PEM formatted key
using the specified SignatureAlgorithm
使用指定的 SignatureAlgorithm 从 PEM 格式的密钥获取密钥对

If aws_lc_rs feature is used, then the key must be a DER-encoded plaintext private key; as specified in PKCS #8/RFC 5958, SEC1/RFC 5915, or PKCS#1/RFC 3447;
Appears as “PRIVATE KEY”, “RSA PRIVATE KEY”
若使用 aws_lc_rs feature，则密钥必须是按 PKCS #8/RFC 5958、SEC1/RFC 5915 或 PKCS#1/RFC 3447 规定的 DER 编码明文私钥；在 PEM 文件中显示为“PRIVATE KEY”、“RSA PRIVATE KEY”

Otherwise if the ring feature is used, then the key must be a DER-encoded plaintext private key; as specified in PKCS #8/RFC 5958;
Appears as “PRIVATE KEY” in PEM files.
否则，若使用 ring feature，则密钥必须是按 PKCS #8/RFC 5958 规定的 DER 编码明文私钥；在 PEM 文件中显示为“PRIVATE KEY”。
Same as from_pem_and_sign_algo.
与 from_pem_and_sign_algo 相同。

Note that using the ring feature, this function only support PrivateKeyDer::Pkcs8 variant.
Consider using the aws_lc_rs features to support PrivateKeyDer fully.
注意，使用 ring feature 时，此函数仅支持 PrivateKeyDer::Pkcs8 变体。如需完整支持 PrivateKeyDer，请考虑使用 aws_lc_rs feature。

If you have a PrivateKeyDer, you can usually rely on the TryFrom implementation
to obtain a KeyPair – it will determine the correct SignatureAlgorithm for you.
However, sometimes multiple signature al
如果你有 PrivateKeyDer，通常可依赖 TryFrom 实现来获取 KeyPair —— 它会为你确定正确的 SignatureAlgorithm。但有时可能存在多个签名算法

You can use rustls_pemfile::private_key to get the key input. If
you have already a byte slice, just calling try_into() will convert it to a PrivateKeyDer.
你可以使用 rustls_pemfile::private_key 来获取密钥输入。如果你已经有字节切片，直接调用 try_into() 即可将其转换为 PrivateKeyDer。

The key is in raw format, as how KeyPair::public_key()
would output, and how UnparsedPublicKey::verify()
would accept.
密钥为原始格式，与 KeyPair::public_key() 输出的格式一致，也是 UnparsedPublicKey::verify() 所接受的格式。

Returns (possibly multiple) compatible SignatureAlgorithm’s
that the key can be used with
返回（可能多个）与该密钥兼容的 SignatureAlgorithm

Returns a reference to the serialized key pair (including the private key)
in PKCS#8 format in DER
返回序列化的密钥对（含私钥）的引用，格式为 PKCS#8 的 DER 编码

The NameConstraints extension
(only relevant for CA certificates)
NameConstraints 扩展（仅与 CA 证书相关）
Retrieve the SignatureAlgorithm for the provided OID
按给定的 OID 检索 SignatureAlgorithm
The Hash trait is not derived, but implemented according to impl of the PartialEq trait
未派生 Hash trait，但根据 PartialEq trait 的实现方式实现

The key is formatted according to the X.509 SubjectPublicKeyInfo struct.
See RFC 5280 section 4.1.
密钥按 X.509 SubjectPublicKeyInfo 结构进行格式化。参见 RFC 5280 第 4.1 节。

Calculates a subject key identifier for the certificate subject’s public key.
This key identifier is used in the SubjectKeyIdentifier X.509v3 extension.
为证书主体的公钥计算 subject key identifier。该密钥标识符用于 SubjectKeyIdentifier X.509v3 扩展中。

The constructed CSR will contain attributes based on the certificate parameters, and include the subject public key information from subject_key. Additionally, the CSR will be signed using the subject key.
所构造的 CSR 将包含基于证书参数的属性，并包含来自 subject_key 的主体公钥信息。此外，CSR 将使用主体密钥签名。
Note that subsequent invocations of serialize_request() will not produce the exact same output.
注意，后续对 serialize_request() 的调用不会产生完全相同的输出。
Generate and serialize a certificate signing request (CSR) with custom PKCS #10 attributes. as defined in RFC 2986.
按 RFC 2986 中定义的、带有自定义 PKCS #10 属性的方式，生成并序列化证书签名请求（CSR）。

The constructed CSR will contain attributes based on the certificate parameters, and include the subject public key information from subject_key. Additionally, the CSR will be self-signed using the subject key.
所构造的 CSR 将包含基于证书参数的属性，并包含来自 subject_key 的主体公钥信息。此外，CSR 将使用主体密钥自签名。
Note that subsequent invocations of serialize_request_with_attributes() will not produce the exact same output.
注意，后续对 serialize_request_with_attributes() 的调用不会产生完全相同的输出。

The returned certificate will have its issuer field set to the subject of the provided issuer, and the authority key identifier extension will be populated using the subject public key of issuer (typically either a CertificateParams or another Certificate). It will be self-signed if issuer is None.
返回的证书将其 issuer 字段设置为所提供的 issuer 的 subject，并使用 issuer 的主体公钥（通常为 CertificateParams 或另一个 Certificate）填充 authority key identifier 扩展。若 issuer 为 None，则证书将自签名。
